name: CFmon.clisccpSouth30
title: ISCCP Cloud Area Percentage
description: Percentage cloud cover in optical depth categories.
processing note:
7 levels x 7 tau. CHANGE SINCE CMIP6 in Cell Methods - CMIP6:area: time: mean CMIP7:area: time: mean where air, 
This is a regional subset of the variable. If you are producing the global equivalent of CFmon.clisccpSouth30, you should omit this regional South30 version.
